title: A Little Extra Tiles
description: Adds several QoL features to the mod LittleTiles, such as a Tape measure, new structure types, and a better color selector.
body:
A Little Extra Tiles(ALET) is an Addon to [LittleTiles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/littletiles). This Mod requires LittleTiles and CreativeCore to Function.
This mod used to be called LTPhotos. 

The current version of A Little Extra Tiles (ALET) 1.0.23 is compatible with CreativeCore_v1.10.70 and LittleTiles_v1.5.58_mc1.12.2.
You can convert an image to Little Tile Structure with the Photo Importer. You can, by default, only convert images no larger than 98 by 98.

With the Typewriter, you can convert text and select a font type.

 

With the Tape Measure, you punch to select one corner, then right-click to select another corner. Press C while holding the Tape Measure, and you can select the measurement grid, color shape, and which measurement as well as clear the measurement. Right now, you can only make ten individual measurements.
